message:
fix(runtime): preserve dirty state when render/present is skipped by budget

When frame budget is exhausted before render or after render but before
present, dirty was incorrectly cleared. This caused UI updates to be
silently dropped — the model had changed but the frame was never shown.

Now dirty=true is preserved when the frame is skipped and only cleared
when present() actually runs. (bd-2u35t)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
